checks.detail: AG74I ownership flag must be true.
Panchang card must exist.
Heading must remain neutral after date/location changes.
Panchang selector must contain exactly one Varanasi option.
Varanasi must be the selected default.
Itanagar must not remain selected.
Varanasi must not be inserted into Star Reflection.
Panchang date picker must open on today in Asia/Kolkata.
DD/MM/YYYY text field must be populated.
Current bank must produce governed unavailable state for Varanasi/today.
No unapproved record may be labelled as public.
Visible Panchang card must not expose transition-era status vocabulary.
Panchang location-basis copy must be governed and free of transition-era vocabulary.
Annual book must exist.
Annual book must appear below Upcoming Observance.
Annual book must contain four pages.
Page 1 must be open initially.
Begins, Ends and ritual-window fields must exist.
Next Day must advance one civil date.
Unavailable state must preserve the selected date.
Today must restore the active location date.
Location button must update the Panchang selector.
Current static records with false publication flags must not render publicly.
Explicit AG74I public approval must be mandatory.
Exact eligible record test must pass.
Timezone mismatch must be rejected.
Duplicate eligible matches must classify as conflict.
Legacy writers must not replace the AG74I observance DOM.
Legacy writers must not manufacture a public result.
No load-time guard may replace the initialized AG74I date controls.
Calendar page 2 must open.
Panchang/date/location input must not create persistent browser keys.
